candidate_problems.text: Identify borderline cases—such as bereavement-triggered major depression—where suffering begins as loss-indexed updating but becomes global informational shutdown, and specify the transition markers.

Test whether the proposed distinction predicts differential response to interventions: meaning-centered social rituals for grief versus treatments that restore agency, motivation, or valuation processes in depression.
Clarify whether depression without obvious cognitive distortion but with severe anhedonia fits the 'informational failure' model or requires a different explanatory layer.
